headline: 5 Stocks With High ROE to Bet on as Oil Price Volatility Hits Markets
summary: ROST, GL, AVGO, CL and TEL emerge as top bets as oil volatility shakes markets, spotlighting cash-rich firms built to deliver stronger returns.
